name: Himachal Tour with Amritsar
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Amritsar, Dharamshala, Shimla, Manali with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

variants.label: 8N/9D
variants.old_html_file: Exotic  Himachal Tour Package with Amritsar for 09 Days.html

itinerary.title: Delhi to Shimla(350 Kms
itinerary.description: Delhi to Shimla(350 Kms. 7/8 Hrs.)- Chandigarh to Shimla(120 Kms. 4 Hrs. approx.): Upon arrival Morning at Delhi/Chandigarh Airport/ Railways station and drive towards Shimla. Shimla, a very popular holiday-retreat, is well-known for its Victorian architecture, which is reflected in certain areas of the Mall and The Ridge. Upon arrival at Shimla, Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.title: After breakfast at the hotel, proceed for a half day excursion to Kufri (2500mts
itinerary.description: After breakfast at the hotel, proceed for a half day excursion to Kufri (2500mts). Kufri is also renowned for other adventure activities such as skiing, tobogganing (sliding downhill on a sled), etc. You can also take a hike or a Pony up to Mashu Peak(own cost-direct payment basis). Afternoon: Guests will be dropped at the Shimla elevator & explore by themselves. Attractions of the mall road include Shimla Church, Scandal Point, Gaiety Theater, Town hall, Jaku Temple & shopping. Overnight at the

itinerary.title: Shimla to Manali (240 Kms
itinerary.description: Shimla to Manali (240 Kms. 7/8 Hrs. approx.):After breakfast at the hotel, depart for Manali. Drive past Beas-Sutlej Link project, Pandoh Dam & En-Rout halt Kullu Valley & river rafting (Own your cost), Lunch shall be en-route on direct payment basis. Overnight at the hotel.

itinerary.title: After breakfast, proceed for Manali sightseeing and visit Hadimba Temple, Vashis
itinerary.description: After breakfast, proceed for Manali sightseeing and visit Hadimba Temple, Vashisht temple, Solang Valley,  Mall Road. Overnight stay at the hotel. *Optional Tour with extra paid: Atul tunel, Sissu, Rohtang pas.

itinerary.title: Manali To Dharamshala (225 Kms
itinerary.description: Manali To Dharamshala (225 Kms. 7 Hrs. approx.): After breakfast, proceed to Dharamshala. On the way visit Baijnath Shiva Temple and Palampur Tea Garden & stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Dharamshala To Dalhousie(125 Kms
itinerary.description: Dharamshala To Dalhousie(125 Kms. 4 Hrs. approx.): After breakfast, Towards Dalhousie after doing the local sightseeing of Places which includes, His holiness Dalai lama residence & Tsugalkhang at Mcleodganj, St. john’s church in the wilderness (Built in 1853),War memorial, Bhagsunath temple and Dal Lake, Norbulingka, Gyuto Rameda Tantric Monastery. Reach Dalhousie in the evening. Stay at a hotel.

itinerary.title: Dalhousie has been named after the British Governor – General of the l9th centur
itinerary.description: Dalhousie has been named after the British Governor – General of the l9th century, Lord Dalhousie. Surrounded by varied vegetation – pines, dodders, oaks and flowering rhododendrons. Local sightseeing of Dalhousie includes visit to Panjipula, Subhash Baoli and excursion to Khajjiar 24 km from Dalhousie surrounded by thick Deodar forest. Drive from Dalhousie to Khajjiar is awesome. Stay at a hotel.

itinerary.title: Dalhousie To Amritsar (200 Kms
itinerary.description: Dalhousie To Amritsar (200 Kms. 5/6 Hrs. approx.): After breakfast, drive to Amritsar & visit the evening retreat border ceremony at wagah border & visit Golden temple. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Amritsar To Delhi (550 Kms
itinerary.description:
Amritsar To Delhi (550 Kms. 10 Hrs. approx.)- Amritsar to Chandigarh (250 Kms. 5/6 Hrs. approx.): After breakfast, proceed to  After breakfast, drive to Delhi/Chandigarh & Drop you at the airport/railway Station.
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours
(Honeymoon Tour available on demand)
Inclusions
Accommodation
Welcome Drink Non Alcoholic.
Breakfast & Dinner
All Transfers, All sightseeing as per Tour Itinerary
All long distance Travels
Toll Taxes, Parkings, Fuel
State Taxes, Green Taxes,
